types.prompt_words: slow aerial push-in toward, cinematic drone shot

types.use_when: narration names a specific object, line, or person
types.prompt_words: slow push-in on, shallow focus, deliberate zoom
subtle handheld drift, slight sway, documentary feel
slow lateral pan across, steady tracking

types.use_when: typeset cards, stamps, held archival moments

rules: never the same motion type more than twice in a row
